text: Come in, Come in! President, do you copy?
Confirm that you are recieving this transmission through the interface below this screen.
Good, good! This is your Secretary of State. I'm receiving you loud and clear, sir.
Due to rising tensions between us and Russia, we have relocated you to a remote, undisclosed bunker.
there is a window to act, and how you proceed will shape what comes next.
From the bunker, you currently have four secure channels available to you, sir.
You may speak with different important figures to shape the outcome of this country.
In addition, as you can see, there is red button in the center of the dashboard.
It directly connects to our entire nuclear arsenal, aimed at various enemies of the state.
Despite being encased for now, I urge you to only consider pressing it as a last resort, sir.
Now, for these four channels I currently have connected,
you may speak with the Press to address the American people directly.
You may also reach out to a Congressman to coordinate legislative support.
A wealthy private sector ally has also requested talks regarding economic measures and the conflict.
Finally, a direct line to the opposing nation's leader has been established and is standing by.
Who would you like me to connect to you first?
Now that you have talked to all four channels...
Will you or will you not press the button?
Mr. President! I was monitoring the entire interview, and I just wanted to say
While the outcome was not ideal, it could have been worse.
It's your role to ease tensions, but that interview have done nothing to aleviate them.
However, the public's perception of you shouldn't change much.
Conversations with actual people with power matter the most.
Mr. President! I was monitoring the entire interview, and I just wanted to say
It went terribly! I can't believe you would say such blatantly false information!
Mass protests calling for your removal have sprung like weeds around the country.
I have faith in you, but you must do better.
There are more open lines I can connect you to.
We are on the verge of global nuclear disaster...
So think carefully before saying anything rash.
Who would you like to connect to next?
There are more open lines I can connect you to.
Anyone worth their name would have seen that interview you did with NSBNC.
So expect mentions of it.
Who would you like to connect to next?
Mr. President! I was monitoring the entire interview, and I just wanted to say
You did wonderfully!
The protests around the capital have, for now, ceased.
It seems like your interview eased the public's tensions.
However, conversations with actual people with power matter more than public pereption.
